hero.label: For Brands
hero.desc: Launch influencer campaigns with confidence. AI-matched creators, verified audience data, automated payments, and real-time ROI reporting — all in one platform.

matching.label: AI Matching
matching.title: Stop guessing. Start matching.
matching.desc: Our AI analyzes your campaign brief, target audience, tone, and vertical to rank every creator by how well they actually fit — not just by follower count or price.
points: Content style and tone alignment scored

workflow.label: Campaign workflow
workflow.title: From brief to live content — fully managed

steps.title: Create your campaign brief
steps.desc: Set your goals, target audience, content guidelines, platforms, and budget. AI pre-fills suggestions based on your brand profile.

steps.title: Review AI-ranked creator matches
steps.desc: Get a shortlist of creators ranked by fit score. Review their profiles, past work, and audience data before making any decisions.

steps.title: Invite, brief, and approve
steps.desc: Send collaboration invites, share briefs, manage Q&A, and approve or request revisions on submitted content — all in one thread.

steps.title: Track performance in real time
steps.desc: Monitor reach, impressions, clicks, and conversions per creator. See which posts outperform and why.

steps.title: Payments handled automatically
steps.desc: Escrow is released when content is approved. No invoices, no delays, no disputes. Everything is logged in the platform.

nano.label: The nano advantage
nano.title: Why 73% of our brand campaigns use nano creators
nano.desc: Big names drive awareness. Small, trusted voices drive conversion. InfluencIA makes it easy to run both.

items.title: 3–8× higher engagement
items.desc: Nano creators consistently generate 3–8% engagement vs 1–2% for celebrities. Your content is actually seen and acted on.

items.title: Hyper-niche targeting
items.desc: A nano creator in Casablanca's fitness community reaches exactly the audience you need — not a diluted general population.

items.title: Authentic trust
items.desc: 76% of consumers trust nano influencer recommendations. They're perceived as friends, not advertisements.

items.title: Cost-effective scale
items.desc: For the price of one macro campaign, you can run 10–15 nano campaigns and reach more engaged, targeted audiences.

analytics.label: Reporting
analytics.title: Prove ROI. Export everything.
analytics.desc: Every campaign comes with a full performance report: per-creator breakdowns, content-level data, audience overlap analysis, and exportable dashboards for your stakeholders.

cta.title: Your next campaign is 72 hours away.
cta.desc: Create a brief, get AI-matched creators, launch — and start seeing results within a week.
